hook: A no or not yet is not just a boundary to respect; it is also a chance to show emotional steadiness.
body: How you handle limits often says more about your maturity than how boldly you pursued anything before them.

hook: Some men become visibly deflated or sharp when the moment does not go where they hoped.
body: Staying warm and composed under a limit is part of what makes you safer and more attractive in the long run.

hook: Staying warm and composed under a limit is part of what makes you safer and more attractive in the long run.
body: Respecting the boundary cleanly and continuing to enjoy the interaction can build more trust than trying to recover the moment through persuasion.

body: Practice treating a boundary as information to respect, not as a wound to react from.
